attributes.description: Pearl Global Industries Ltd. incorporated in 1987. [1] Pearl Global Industries Limited (PGIL) is a garment exporter, manufacturing from multiple sourcing regions within India and countries within South Asia. The product range includes knits, woven, and bottoms across men, women, and kids' wear segments. [2]
